title: Atlas: assemble many images of one place, object, or event into a relational, spatial, and temporal atlas
description: The second tool of the Parallax suite, a counter-forensic toolkit for art history and the archive. Assembles many images of one place, object, or event into a navigable whole: a Mnemosyne plate of arranged images, a graph of typed relations, camera positions on a map whose sightlines cross to resect a subject, a linked timeline, and serverless deep-zoom close looking with annotation. A single publish boundary clears what leaves the project. Source-available and published for verifiability, not as a product to adopt. Source code is licensed under the PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0; the non-code assets under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.
